body:
Hi Amara,

Really appreciate you taking the time to connect last week — the conversation left me genuinely energized about what [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital) is building in the climate infrastructure space. I wanted to follow up with a bit more context on [GreenPulse](greenpulse-io) and where we are right now: we closed our pre-seed in February, have three enterprise pilots running with mid-size utilities, and are seeing strong early signal on the grid-edge monitoring side. We're beginning to think seriously about a seed round over the next 60–90 days and, given your focus, I'd love to explore whether there's a fit worth digging into further. Would you be open to a deeper technical and commercial walkthrough sometime in the next couple of weeks?

Best,
Dev
